quote: Go confidently in the direction of your dreams! Live the life you've imagined. – Henry David Thoreau
fact: The symbol on the "pound" key (#) is called an octothorpe..
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: Feeling pretty proud of myself. The Sesame Street puzzle I bought said 3-5 years, but I finished it in 18 months.
